title: Implement /keys resource handlers per LCI spec
description: Implement /keys CoAP resource per LCI spec 17.5.5. GET /keys lists peer IIDs, GET /keys/{iid} returns peer pubkey, PUT adds/updates peer key, DELETE removes peer. Keys stored in Zephyr settings or secure storage. Access control: require authentication for write operations.
acceptance_criteria: coap-client can list, read, add, delete peer keys; unauthorized PUT/DELETE rejected
close_reason: Implemented coap_keys.c: GET/PUT/DELETE /keys/{iid}, TOFU pinning, SHA-256 fingerprints
